description: A designed square 'THE WORST FIRST' arrest card using the standard template. Background is the recurring high-contrast black-and-white close-up of open hands in metal handcuffs, dark gradient on the left. Top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with white subline '2/11/2025 | Detroit, MI'. Red diagonal corner banner top-right reads 'DETROIT'. Large bold white sans-serif name at mid-left: 'Bosko Kablar'. Bold white 'CRIME:' label with bullet 'Homicide'. Bottom-left round DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; bottom-right red box '-THE- WORST FIRST'. As with most cards in the series, a generic handcuffed-hands stock photo stands in for a real mugshot. Propaganda technique: pairing a serious violent charge (homicide) with the named individual and a local city tag to dramatize the danger removed by ICE. Target audience: general public and local media.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/11/2025 | Detroit, MI; Bosko Kablar; CRIME: Homicide; DETROIT; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
